'''bataba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swage|swage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swage|swage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bataba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bætæbæth|bætæbæth]] || [[word:bætæbæj|bætæbæj]] || [[word:bætæbæsh|bætæbæsh]] || [[word:bætæbæ|bætæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:batatabath|batatabath]] || [[word:batatabaj|batatabaj]] || [[word:batatabash|batatabash]] || [[word:batataba|batataba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:batabath|batabath]] || [[word:batabaj|batabaj]] || [[word:batabash|batabash]] || [[word:bataba|bataba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:batafbath|batafbath]] || [[word:batafbaj|batafbaj]] || [[word:batafbash|batafbash]] || [[word:batafbaf|batafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:batabatha|batabatha]] || [[word:batabaja|batabaja]] || [[word:batabasha|batabasha]] || [[word:batabaka|batabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:batabath|batabath]] || [[word:batabaj|batabaj]] || [[word:batabash|batabash]] || [[word:bataba|bataba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:batabathal|batabathal]] || [[word:batabajal|batabajal]] || [[word:batabashal|batabashal]] || [[word:batabakal|batabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:batabathatha|batabathatha]] || [[word:batabajaja|batabajaja]] || [[word:batabashasha|batabashasha]] || [[word:batabaka|batabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:batabathan|batabathan]] || [[word:batabajan|batabajan]] || [[word:batabashan|batabashan]] || [[word:batabakan|batabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:batabathaoro|batabathaoro]] || [[word:batabajaoro|batabajaoro]] || [[word:batabashaoro|batabashaoro]] || [[word:batabakaoro|batabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
